# S. Phaneuf & Associates

> Professional asphalt paving, excavation, masonry, and hardscaping services serving residential and commercial clients across Central and Eastern Massachusetts and Southern New Hampshire.

S. Phaneuf & Associates is a premier full-service property development and maintenance company. With over 35 years of experience, the company specializes in high-quality asphalt solutions, intricate masonry, comprehensive site development, and reliable snow management. They are known for combining professional-grade craftsmanship with affordable, local service.

## Core Services

- [Asphalt Paving](https://sphaneufassociates.com/asphalt-paving) - Expert installation and maintenance of driveways, parking lots, roads, and sports courts. Includes sealcoating and crack filling.
- [Masonry & Hardscapes](https://sphaneufassociates.com/masonry-hardscapes) - Custom design and construction of stone patios, walkways, retaining walls, outdoor kitchens, and fire pits using natural stone and pavers.
- [Excavation & Site Development](https://sphaneufassociates.com/excavation-site-development) - Full-scale site preparation including land clearing, grading, foundation digging, septic systems, and underground utility installation.
- [Snow & Ice Management](https://sphaneufassociates.com/snow-ice-management) - 24/7 commercial and residential snow plowing, de-icing, and snow hauling services during winter months.

## Key Information

- **Service Areas:** Extensive coverage in Massachusetts (Middlesex, Worcester, Essex, Suffolk, Norfolk, Bristol, and Plymouth Counties) and Southern New Hampshire.
- **Specialties:** Residential driveways, commercial parking lots, drainage solutions (Cultec systems), and luxury outdoor living spaces.
- **Business Model:** Family-owned and operated, offering free consultations and estimates.

## Important Pages

- [Service Areas](https://sphaneufassociates.com/service-areas) - Detailed list of cities and counties served in MA and NH.
- [About Us](https://sphaneufassociates.com/about) - Company history and mission statement.
- [Contact Us](https://sphaneufassociates.com/contact) - Request a free estimate or consultation.
- [Gallery/Projects](https://sphaneufassociates.com/projects) - Portfolio showcasing completed paving and masonry work.
